Increased the invisibility interrupt grace period for teammates from 0.65s to 0.8s; Increased the invisibility interrupt grace period for the player from 0s to 0.35s; Increased the duration of Vanishing Bomb invisibility on teammates from 5s to 6s
Added a range limit to Recon Senses set to 30m. Players outside of this range will not be detected. Players detected by Recon Senses will now see ‘Detected’ warning text on their HUD.
Lowered the number of rounds required to play Ranked Tournament from 60 to 45
Gravity and physics have been enabled on Red Canisters with attachments. Overloaded cans will now drop faster and take less predictable pathways.
Fixed an issue where multiple C4s would cause more damage than intended when exploding together, for example when attached to an object.
Decreased ammo count from 2 to 1; Decreased cooldown from 45s to 30s; Decreased minimum damage at the edge of the explosion from 93 to 75

Added functionality that causes revived players to gradually re-materialize into the level over a period of 3s before fully loading back into the arena; Increased charge-up time from 0.6s to 0.8s; Increased starting health from a defibrillator revive from 40% to 50%
Decreased maximum duration from 20s to 12s
Increased cooldown from 25s to 30s
Moved from the Light archetype to the Heavy

Increased projectile dispersion in all non-aiming states; Reduced projectile dispersion when aiming down sights; Increased zoom-in time from 0.2s to 0.4s; Increased equip time from 0.45s to 0.5s; Increased unequip time from 0.35s to 0.4s
Moved from the Medium archetype to the Light
Moved from the Medium archetype to the Light; Decreased dispersion in most movement states by 50%; Increased accuracy by decreasing dart dispersion while aiming down sights from 30% to 10%
Increased grace period on teammates from 0.75s to 1.25s; Increased total cloaked duration on teammates from 6s to 7.5s; Increased total cloaked duration on the user from 5s to 6s
Removed for assessment
Increased cooldown on a fully depleted shield from 12s to 15s
Increased starting health after full depletion from 200 to 250
Decreased damage falloff minimum range from 35m to 30m; Decreased damage falloff max range from 40m to 37.5m; Decreased damage falloff modifier at max range from 67% to 55%
Decreased damage falloff modifier at max range from 67% to 55%
Updated weapon recoil pattern to be slightly less accurate over time during sustained firing
Increased accuracy by decreasing bullet dispersion when firing from the hip

Updated weapon recoil pattern to be slightly more accurate over time during sustained firing; Increased accuracy by decreasing bullet dispersion while moving when firing from the hip; Increased accuracy by decreasing bullet dispersion while moving when firing while aiming down sights; Decreased accuracy slightly by increasing bullet dispersion while standing still when firing while aiming down sights
Increased damage falloff modifier at max range from 33% to 45%
Increased projectile speed from 120m/s to 138m/s
Decreased accuracy by increasing bullet dispersion when firing from the hip in most movement states

Added a delay to the application of damage. Damage will now start to tick 0.5s after the player enters the gas cloud; Added new functionality that causes damage to ramp up gradually over time, from 30hp/s to 60 hp/s over 2s.; Increased damage tick interval from 0.1s per tick to 0.3s per tick

balance_changes.details: Fire rate 230RPM -> 200RPM; Damage per pellet 7 -> 6
Now trigger on impact when hitting mesh shields and dome shields; still bounce on other surfaces
Now trigger on impact when hitting mesh shields and dome shields
APS turret now consumes a set amount of health for each projectile it destroys. Health cost per destroyed projectile is 40%.

Delay before the first projectile spawns reduced from 0.22s to 0.11s. Delay between the first and second projectile spawning reduced from 0.15s to 0.11s. Initial projectile speed increased from 138m/s to 166m/s. Primary attack damage increased from 60 to 63.
Removed exploit allowing higher fire rate than intended
Removed exploit allowing higher fire rate than intended
Removed exploit allowing higher fire rate than intended

Fire rate 55 RPM -> 73 RPM; Player damage 120 -> 100; Environmental damage 600 -> 700; Pump-action animation delay 0.2s -> 0s; Pump-action animation duration 0.6s -> 0.7s; Damage fall-off start range 15m -> 18m; Damage fall-off end range 50m -> 23m; Damage fall-off multiplier at max range 0.4 -> 0.6; Projectile speed 200m/s -> 300m/s; Decreased bullet dispersion when firing from the hip while crouching, standing, and running.
Adjusted recoil pattern to make the weapon slightly less easy to control; Damage fall-off multiplier at max range 0.67 -> 0.5.
Adjusted recoil pattern to make the weapon slightly easier to control.
Fire rate 240 RPM -> 260 RPM.
Duration of glitch effect 10s -> 5s.
Duration of glitch effect 10s -> 5s.
Recoil curve recovery delay increased from 0.68 to 0.8; Recoil recovery time increased from 0.8 to 1
Projectile weapons (Grenades, RPG, MG32L, CL-40) can now pass through friendly teammates.
Projectile weapons (Grenades, RPG, MG32L, CL-40) can now pass through friendly teammates.
Projectile weapons (Grenades, RPG, MG32L, CL-40) can now pass through friendly teammates.
Projectile weapons (Grenades, RPG, MG32L, CL-40) can now pass through friendly teammates.
Range increased from 5m to 15m; Target FOV decreased from 25 degrees to 12 degrees
Increased the activation cost from 14.2% to 33%
Decreased health from 1000 to 750
Bullet dispersion reduced when jumping, sprinting, or zoomed in
Increased the size of the Barricade by 20%
Glitch effect now passes through Mesh Shields and Dome Shields

Increased projectile maximum travel distance from 12m to 16m. Stunned players can now use Specializations and Gadgets, aim down sights, and crouch. Stun effect now primarily lowers movement speed, blocks jumping, mantling, and vaulting, and interrupts interactions.
Decreased the impact of the cloaking effect, making affected players slightly easier to see when moving.
Decreased the impact of the cloaking effect, making cloaked players slightly easier to see when they are moving.
Damage decreased from 25 to 22; magazine size increased from 20 to 25; fall-off damage multiplier at max range increased from 50% to 55%.
Melee aim assistance now validates targets at the time aim correction is applied, reducing instances where melee attacks pull the player away from a target.

Made the cube heavier so that it doesn’t get pushed as easily when hit by other objects. Fixed a bug where objects would lift much faster than intended when they were attached together. This also prevents an exploit in which the cube could be carried upwards together with the objects it’s lifting, causing entire structures to traverse upwards into the sky endlessly.
Can now clear higher obstacles when activated on the ground to reduce instances where players get stuck on geometry.
Improved backstab validation. Fixed so that the aim assist for backstabs now synchronizes with the swing, rather than triggering at the start of the charge-up.

Improved hit validation for all melee weapons. The aim assist and lunge range are slightly more generous for quick melee. Changed the way sprinting gets blocked when attacking with melee weapons and using quick melee, so that sprint is only blocked through parts of a swing, instead of the whole duration of the attack. This is tweaked on a weapon-to-weapon basis. The sprint toggle no longer gets canceled by melee attacks.
The shield can now be raised more quickly after performing an attack.
Is now correctly marked as a Marksman Rifle instead of a Melee Weapon in the menus.
Decreased health regeneration delay from 10 seconds to 7 seconds (does not apply in Terminal Attack).
Decreased health regeneration delay from 10 seconds to 9 seconds (does not apply in Terminal Attack).
Healing Beam has been replaced with Guardian Turret as the default specialization.
Defibrillator has been replaced with Glitch Trap as one of the default gadgets.
Getting hit by goo will now block movement Specializations such as Evasive Dash, except Charge ‘n Slam.
Decreased max range from 20m to 17m.
Increased ammo count from 1 to 2.
Increased cooldown from 15s to 26s.
Increased ammo count from 1 to 2.
Increased cooldown from 15s to 26s.
Increased radius from 4.5m to 5m.

Glitch trap is no longer a proximity detonation device. It now has a line-of-sight application. If an enemy player stands within range and in line-of-sight to the trap it will attach a tether to them. Tethered players have the Glitch effect applied to them, preventing them from using Specializations and Gadgets, and disrupting their HUD. Players will need to break the line of sight to the trap, destroy it, or get out of range of it, to remove the effect.
Increased the size of the goo wall created by the Goo Grenade from 2x4 to 2x6.
The cooldown regeneration on the Guardian Turret now starts when the turret is destroyed, not when it is deployed.

Motion Sensor no longer sends out impulses at regular intervals for detection. It now has line-of-sight application. If an enemy player stands within range and in line-of-sight to the device, the sensor will attach a tether to them. Tethered players will be scanned by the Motion Sensor, allowing friendly players to see them through walls. Players will need to break the line of sight to the sensor or destroy it, to remove the scanning effect.
Increased ammo count from 2 to 3.
Increased cooldown from 45s to 50s.
Increased detection radius from 10m to 15m.
Players are now unable to use Specializations while the Glitch status is applied.
Updated recoil pattern, making the weapon much easier to control and hopefully making headshots easier to achieve.
Decreased fire rate from 260 RPM to 210 RPM.
Decreased automatic recoil recovery duration from 0.72s to 0.7s, making the weapon easier to control.
Decreased damage from 110 to 93.
Increased fire rate from 250 RPM to 275 RPM.
Decreased automatic recoil recovery duration from 1s to 0.8s, making the weapon easier to control.
Decreased pump-action duration from 0.7s to 0.575s.
Further updated recoil pattern, making the weapon easier to control for the first few bullets in the sequence, but making the weapon recoil more the longer the trigger is held.
Decreased damage from 25 to 22.
Updated firing animation, which should make the weapon easier to use.
Decreased fire rate from 300 RPM to 280 RPM.
Decreased bullet dispersion when crouching and standing still, making the weapon more precise.
Updated recoil pattern, making the weapon recoil more during the first few bullets, but making it easier to control for the rest of the sequence.
Decreased damage from 22 to 19.
Increased damage from 10 to 13 per pellet.
Decreased fire rate from 100 RPM to 80 RPM.
Decreased projectile speed of primary attacks from 16.5 m/s to 14.75 m/s.
Decreased projectile air drag of primary attacks from 7.5 to 7, allowing the projectile to travel farther.
Increased damage from 36 to 37.
Decreased radius from 6m to 3.5m.
Decreased the size of the goo wall created by the Goo Barrel from 2x6 to 2x4.
Decreased radius from 5m to 3.5m.
duration from 0.7s to 0.575s

new_content.details: Launches a chain that pulls objects or enemies toward you, briefly stunning them
Long-range breaching tool for walls and obstacles
Best of 13, first to 7 format
Temples, gardens, bamboo forests, shallow water that slows movement, shoji paper walls with bullet penetration

bug_fixes: Fixed equipped charms disappearing near walls
Fire propagation now has distance limits
other_changes: Added 10 new Career ranks
Skip elimination camera feature added
Text chat added to PC version
Player card background customization
Rank badges for World Tour and Ranked Mode
Terminal Attack key delivery now requires terminal interaction (no throwing)
Terminal Attack added 25-second warm-up zones
Medium default loadout: Healing Beam replaced with Guardian Turret; Defibrillator replaced with Glitch Trap
Added one additional progression level for all weapons/gadgets

balance_changes.details: Range decreased from 15m to 12m
Damage decreased from 52 to 48
Damage decreased from 63 to 60
Damage decreased from 15 to 5
Duration decreased from 12s to 5.5s
Time for fire to destroy goo decreased from 12s to 9s
Time for fire to destroy goo decreased from 12s to 9s

Support score generated from absorbing damage lowered by ~50%
Decreased minimum damage applied at outer edge of explosions to 0; Increased damage radius from 2m to 2.5m; Set damage fall-off to scale linearly from the max damage radius to the outer radius
Decreased minimum damage applied at outer edge of explosions to 0; Increased damage radius from 6m to 6.5m; Set damage fall-off to scale linearly from the max damage radius to the outer radius

Decreased minimum damage applied at outer edge of explosions to 0; Increased damage radius from 4.5m to 5.5m; Set damage fall-off to scale linearly from the max damage radius to the outer radius
Reduced the impulse applied by the secondary attack
Increased the time it takes for fire to destroy goo from 6s to 12s
Increased the cooldown duration from 5.5s to 6.5s per charge
Increased the time it takes for fire to destroy goo from 6s to 12s
Decreased the cooldown duration from 10s to 8s
Decreased the time taken until the Healing Beam can overheat from 7s to 5.5s
Slightly decreased bullet dispersion when firing from the hip in all stances, making the weapon more accurate
Decreased the amount of horizontal recoil when firing the 93R, making it easier to control and more precise
Slightly tightened the cluster of bullets fired in a burst, making the weapon more precise
Increased radius from 6m to 7m, Increased height from 11m to 12m
Increased ammo from 2 to 3, Increased cooldown from 26s to 30s
Increased range from 15m to 21m, Increased number of charges from 2 to 3
Decreased max damage from 140 to 120, Decreased cooldown from 30s to 15s, Decreased ammo count from 2 to 1 (max mines deployed remains at 2)

Increased the max duration of the Blind status effect from 4s to 4.5s, Increased the max duration of the max intensity of the Blind status effect from 1.8s to 3.5s, Increase the intensity of flashes that explode close to the enemy’s position, Increased the view angle of flashes, causing more intense flashes when the flash goes off by someone’s side or slightly behind them, Flashbangs now only show Hit Indicators on the crosshair if they reach a minimum amount of intensity on a hostile target, Decreased the intensity and duration of the Blind status effect on teammates, Improved the leniency of hit detection of the Flashbang when targeting players, so that it is less likely to be blocked by small objects
Disabled crosshair hit markers when the Glitch Trap attaches to an enemy, so that it can no longer be used to detect players, Decreased ammo from 2 to 1, Decreased cooldown from 30s to 20s
Added a small amount of variance to the Jump Pad so that objects cannot bounce on them indefinitely
Increased radius from 10m to 11m
Decreased damage from 140 to 100, Increased reload time from 0.9s to 2.15s, Decreased projectile dispersion when aiming down sights from 0.3x to 0.25x
Increased magazine size from 2 to 4, Decreased ammunition regeneration rate from 13s to 12s, Decreased tracking duration from 15s to 10s
Decreased the height of Ziplines slightly, so that they will better fit through doors
Decreased direct physical impact damage from 50 to 25
Decreased cooldown from 30s to 20s.
Decreased projectile dispersion when aiming down sights from 0.3x to 0.25x.
Increased magazine size from 2 to 4. Decreased ammunition regeneration rate from 13s to 12s.
Decreased tracking duration from 15s to 10s.
Improved targeting to reduce the amount of times the dematerializer fails to make a passageway through objects.
Fire mode changed from semi-automatic to fully automatic.
Decreased healing rate from 50 health per second to 40 health per second.
Mesh Shield will now enter cooldown either when destroyed or lowered. Decreased Mesh Shield cooldown from 15s to 12s. The cooldown is only 8s if the Shield is undamaged when deactivated.

Smoothed the vertical recoil to avoid having sharp jumps in intensity, which could previously cause an inconsistent feel. Increased fire rate from 210 RPM to 220 RPM. Decreased bullet dispersion when firing ‘from the hip’ when crouching, crouch moving, standing still, running, and in ‘uncontrolled’ states such as falling or sliding. Decreased the rate at which bullet dispersion builds up over time when firing for a sustained period. Increased the bullet dispersion recovery speed from 0.45 to 0.65.
Decreased magazine size from 36 to 32.
Increased max damage from 93 to 117. Increased the max damage radius from 9cm to 30cm.
Decreased fire rate from 275 RPm to 210 RPM.

The Dagger’s backstab secondary attack can now be held, only triggering when the button is released, rather than automatically. During this stance, the player moves at the normal run speed and cannot sprint.
Smoothed the recoil pattern of the Lewis Gun, reducing the amount of horizontal recoil at some points. The recoil pattern overall remains the same but should be considerably easier to control.
Decreased the damage fall-off start range from 80m to 50m. Decreased the damage fall-off end range from 100m to 55m.

Increased fire rate from 560 RPM to 580 RPM. Smoothed the recoil pattern of the M60, reducing the amount of horizontal recoil at some points. The recoil pattern overall remains the same but should be considerably easier to control.
Decreased reload time from 3.1s to 2.8s.
Increased damage at minimum draw from 55 to 60. Decreased damage ramp-up start time from 0.2s to 0.15s. Decreased the time taken to reach maximum draw from 0.585s to 0.49s.
Increased damage from 84 to 90.
Decreased reload time from 2.5s to 2.125s.
Increased run speed modifier during secondary spin attack from 65% to 75%.
Updated the SR-84 to now only fire hit-scan rounds up to 40m range. After this point, the shot becomes a projectile with bullet drop from gravity and drag.

Updated attack sweeps to be more centered on the crosshair, making the weapon more accurate. Increased the range of the secondary lunge from approximately 5m to approximately 6m. Secondary lunge attack now maintains its top speed for slightly longer.

The Throwing Knives secondary attack can now be held, only triggering when the button is released, rather than automatically. During this stance, the player moves at the normal run speed and cannot sprint.
Decreased damage from 18 to 16.

other_changes: Ranked Tournaments: Game show events disabled for consistency
Terminal Attack: New best-of-nine format (first to five) with mid-game destruction reset
World Tour: Team wipe penalties disabled; item swapping enabled between team wipes
Final round cash 10K -> 25K; win requirement 20K -> 50K
Significant first-time player experience improvements (intro videos, tutorials, starter outfits)
Static crosshair setting added

balance_changes.details: Added Glitch Barrels to the rotation of reshaped items the Data Reshaper can create
Increased 'smoke entity duration' from 15s to 17.5s
Decreased Mesh Shield cooldown from 12s to 8s if the shield is damaged when closed
Decreased Mesh Shield cooldown from 8s to 4s if the shield is undamaged when closed
Decreased damage from 117 to 100
Increased ammo from 4 to 5
Increased self-damage multiplier from 0.75 to 1.6
Updated damage fall-off curve so that damage drops to 90% at the edge of the 30cm inner radius, with damage falling off linearly from that point to 0 at the outer edge of the blast radius
Decreased damage from 59 to 52
Decreased fire rate from 430 RPM to 360 RPM
Increased damage from 37 to 40
Secondary attack sweep duration decreased by 25%; Secondary attack sweep width decreased from 30cm to 25cm; Primary attack sweep width increased from 12cm to 15cm
Increased inner pellet radius from 0.45 to 0.65; Increased outer pellet radius from 1.3 to 1.7; Decreased damage falloff multiplier from 65% to 60%
Increased damage falloff start distance from 15m to 20m; Increased damage falloff end distance from 25m to 30m; Decreased damage falloff multiplier from 65% to 62%

Max target distance decreased from 12m to 10m; Max healing distance decreased from 15m to 13m; Time before disconnecting a blocked healing beam decreased from 1s to 0.75s
Damage decreased from 52 to 47; Damage falloff multiplier at max range increased from 75% to 85%
Deals damage to shields (Dome Shield, Mesh Shield)
Lunge duration of secondary attack decreased from 0.4s to 0.3s (~1m reduction in distance); Length of secondary attack's hit sweep decreased by 55cm
Added improved targeting, to solve the recurring bug where the hook would hit invisible targets
Fixed an issue that allowed players to interrupt dashes by emoting, making them lunge further than intended
Increased pellet count from 8 to 9 (added a center pellet); Decreased damage from 16 to 13 per pellet; Updated pellet dispersion pattern, reducing the outer radius slightly
Added 'revive sickness' to players revived by the Defibrillator, causing their Specializations and Gadgets to be placed on a five-second cooldown
Increased cooldown from 30s to 40s
Decreased active duration from 7.52 to 5.25s; Decreased time between sonar pulses from 2.5s to 1.75s
Increased cooldown from 30s to 37s

Updated to consume energy based on player's current movement speed while cloaked; Removed the ability for burning damage to break the cloaking effect; Removed the ability for poison damage to break the cloaking effect

Reworked to be energy based (750 energy total); Loses energy when taking damage; Loses 225 energy when player lowers the shield; Energy regenerates when shield has not taken damage for a short time; No longer has a cooldown

Increased damage from 24 to 28; Decreased horizontal recoil after the third burst; Decreased vertical recoil slightly; Increased the damage fall-off start range from 23m to 28m; Increased the damage fall-off multiplier at max range from 45% to 55%

Basic attack: Increased the speed and duration of the lunge; Deflect: Decreased the dispersion angle of deflected bullets from 2.5 to 1; Decreased the damage modifier for direct hits from enemy bullets from 0.2 to 0.1; Decreased the damage modifier for glancing hits from enemy bullets from 0.4 to 0.3; Increased deflection angle from 25 degrees to 35 degrees; Decreased incoming melee damage modifier from 0.33 to 0.25
Decreased bullet dispersion when firing from the hip by approximately 20%

Basic attack: Increased the lunge distance from 6m to 7.5m; Increased the lunge speed by approximately 15%; Increased the lunge cancel; Secondary attack: Increased the damage of each swing from 100 to 105
Increased ammo count from 30 to 34
Decreased the amount of animated “visual recoil” significantly on all red dot optics

new_content.details: Assault rifle firing two bullets per shot
Triple-barrel shotgun with incendiary shells
Remote-triggered singularity pulling objectives, players, and debris
Anchor that ensnares up to three targets simultaneously
Beneath Mexico's Pena de Bernal monolith, rooftop skirmishes, sponsor structures, spinning platform
Social system supporting up to 50 members with daily contracts, bonus XP/Fans, and team roles
Send up to 5 gifts daily including cosmetics and Premium Battle Pass
Select multiple seasonal soundtracks for customized playlists
Randomizes queue times to prevent stream sniping
Available on PS5, PS5 Pro, and Xbox Series X
First-time release on PS4

bug_fixes: Fixed zipline riding while emoting simultaneously
Fixed persistent player sounds after elimination
Fixed Glitch Grenade detonation on shields
Fixed Spear secondary attack hit detection
Fixed volumetric fog ghosting on Xbox Series S and PC
other_changes: Quick Cash respawn system changed to wave-based mechanics
Players can swap contestants between team wipes
Kyoto: Bamboo Forest redesigned with reduced vegetation, increased hard-cover
Added 30 additional career ranks
Default controller sensitivity increased (horizontal 160 -> 200, vertical 130 -> 170)
Maximum controller sensitivity increased 500 -> 750
Hardware restriction capabilities implemented for anti-cheat
Enhanced aimbot detection systems
VOIP system overhauled for reliability

balance_changes.details: Disabled the ability to attach to objectives (Cashbox, Cashout Station)
Decreased max duration of invisibility when fully stationary from 133s to 27s
Priming time decreased from 1.9s to 1.5s
Ammo decreased from 2 to 1
Damage decreased from 150 to 140

Temporarily disabled pending rework
Updated underlying physics of pulled objects for more consistent behavior
Reduced physics force applied to world objects to prevent launching objectives across long distances

Will now cancel and block vaulting for opponents on successful hits
Decreased the delay between throwing multiple Breach Charges from 0.9s to 0.6s

Re-enabled the ability for the Lockbolt to attach to objectives; Increased activation grace period from 0.8s to 1s; Decreased the minimum pull distance from 8m to 6m; Decreased the maximum pull distance from 10m to 6m; Increased the pull force of the Lockbolt by 50%; Increased the damage the Lockbolt applies to targets from 0 to 5; Added functionality that will disable the Lockbolt’s tethers if the Lockbolt is carried through a Gateway that is outside the maximum pull distance (6m)

Decreased the damage done by the initial impact on enemies from 130 to 100; Decreased the damage done by subsequent hits on enemies from 50 to 40; Decreased the minimum damage of the ground slam, based on fall height from 80 to 50
Decreased the duration of dematerialized objects from 30s to 15s; Added the ability for the Dematerializer to remove props attached to wall segments
Decreased the cooldown from 8s to 3s when manually picking up the Guardian Turret
Decreased the range of the Winch Claw from 12m to 10m

Increased damage from 9 to 10 per pellet; Slightly decreased the size of the pellet distribution; Decreased the reload time for reloading one cartridge from 2.2s to 2.1s; Decreased the reload time for reloading two cartridges from 2.4s to 2.25s; Decreased the reload time for reloading three cartridges from 2.6s to 2.45s
Decreased the radius of the weapon’s projectile from 10cm to 5cm; Decreased self-damage multiplier from 1.6 to 1.25
Decreased the fire rate from 230 RPM to 220 RPM; Decreased damage per bullet from 24 to 23
Decreased damage from 48 to 46; Decreased rate of fire from 280 RPM to 270 RPM
Decreased damage from 13 to 11 per pellet; Increased min damage falloff multiplier from 0.6 to 0.7
Increased damage from 47 to 50

Increased min damage falloff multiplier from 0.6 to 0.7
Decreased bullet dispersion when aiming down sights to increase accuracy
Cooldown decreased from 40s to 35s; Effect radius increased from 3.5m to 4m
Damage taken per projectile destroyed decreased from 40% to 31.25% of total health
Ammo count decreased from 3 to 2
Fuse time decreased from 1.8s to 1.5s

Maximum duration increased from 8s to 10s; Minimum duration increased from 5s to 7s; Throw velocity decreased from 16.5m/s to 15m/s; Projectile gravity modifier increased from 1 to 1.7; Maximum throw distance decreased from ~29m to ~15m
Tracking duration on targets increased from 10s to 13s
Fuse time reduced
'Cloak Max Blend' increased from 1.5 to 1.75; 'Delay Before Transitioning Into Cloak' increased from 0 to 0.5s; 'First Person Cloak Multiplier' increased from 0.9 to 1.0

Max range increased from 10m to 12m; Stun duration for Weapons and Gadgets now scales with distance, with max stun duration at max range increased from 0.55s to 0.65s, and min stun duration at min range (3m or less) set to 0.3s
Improved recoil interpolation for smoother camera movement
Inner blast radius increased from 30cm to 60cm; Grenade projectile speed increased from 35m/s to 42m/s; Projectile gravity modifier decreased from 1 to 0.9
Damage of regular attacks increased from 50 to 60; Damage of non-backstab secondary attacks increased from 50 to 75
Improved recoil interpolation for smoother camera movement
Recoil intensity for bullets 5-7 in the firing sequence decreased
Pump-action duration decreased from 0.82s to 0.7s, increasing fire rate from 73RPM to 85RPM
Damage decreased from 46 to 40
Damage falloff max range increased from 15m to 17.5m; Damage falloff multiplier decreased from 0.62 to 0.52
Damage increased from 19 to 20; Damage falloff max range increased from 32m to 35m; Damage falloff multiplier increased from 0.4 to 0.5

Damage falloff minimum range decreased from 50m to 45m; Damage falloff max range decreased from 55m to 50m; Damage falloff multiplier decreased from 0.85 to 0.75; Visual recoil when aiming-down-sights significantly reduced

Pellet count decreased from 13 to 12 (total damage per shot decreased from 78 to 72); Damage falloff minimum range increased from 10m to 12.5m; Damage falloff max range increased from 15m to 20m; Pellet pattern adjusted for closer-range role
Damage increased from 16 to 17; Damage falloff minimum range increased from 20m to 22.5m; Damage falloff max range increased from 30m to 32.5m; Damage falloff multiplier decreased from 0.62 to 0.52

new_content.details: Fast-reload assault rifle with secondary magazine
Lever-action precision rifle with speed-loader
High fire-rate with massive ammo reserves
Permanent 5v5 mode in Quick Play on 6 arenas
Complete redesign with sponsor-themed casinos, improved movement/sightlines
Earn points across all Quick Play modes for seasonal rewards
Save/mix 24 outfits with instant application across builds
Smarties react to player loadouts
Privacy option for streaming
Holographic, Looking Glass, Adder Reflex, Compact Reflector added across various weapons

bug_fixes: Fixed APS collision blocking bullets when attached to liftable objects
Corrected interaction interruptions at Cashout/statue start
Fixed cloak detection (players uncloaked by flamethrower)
Resolved respawn token loss during revives
Corrected weapon equip delays after dropping objects
Fixed rare flying mode after ladder interactions
Improved animation transitions (sprinting to ADS, vaulting, melee)
Optimized Las Vegas Stadium destruction system
Fixed Gravity Vortex custom skins persistence
Corrected Ranked Cashout leaderboard information hiding
other_changes: Bank It removed from Quick Play rotation (remains in Private Matches)
Power Shift expansion: Added to Bernal and Las Vegas Stadium
New Sorry emote added
Store overhaul with weapon skin animation previews
Spectator mode camera save feature (9 angles)
Ranked Score removed from Player Cards
Improved AHK violation messaging
Hardware bans implemented

balance_changes.details: Damage 15 -> 17
Secondary attack damage 140 -> 105
Winding up the minigun no longer uses the secondary fire input action. Instead winding up the minigun uses the same keybind as aim down sight (Hold or Toggle)

Scope movement when aiming down the scope is now toned down to more accurately reflect where the shots will land when firing. Improved the camera motion when crouching or stopping after moving while aiming down the scope.
Environmental damage increased from 8 to 18
Bullet dispersion decreased by approximately 10% when standing still and 'focus firing'; Bullet dispersion decreased by approximately 10% when moving and focus firing
Winch Claw will now force players it hooks into the ‘uncontrolled’ state, adjusting the victim’s bullet dispersion and recoil as if they were falling from a building
Damage falloff minimum range 37.5m -> 35m; Damage falloff max range 47.5m -> 42m
Damage falloff minimum range 28m -> 32m; Damage falloff max range 35m -> 40m; Damage falloff multiplier 0.55 -> 0.4
Quick reload animation duration 0.95s -> 0.75s
Pellet count 12 -> 11 (max damage per shot 120 -> 110)
Damage falloff minimum range 37.5m -> 35m; Damage falloff max range 47.5m -> 42.5m
Pump-action duration 0.8s -> 0.78s (fire rate 75RPM -> 77RPM); Damage falloff minimum range 15m -> 20m; Damage falloff max range 25m -> 30m; Damage falloff multiplier 0.7 -> 0.65
Damage falloff minimum range 23m -> 27.5m; Damage falloff max range 40m -> 44m; Damage falloff multiplier 0.45 -> 0.4
Rate of fire 200RPM -> 190RPM; Magazine rotation animation duration 1.1s -> 0.8s
Updated the recoil pattern to be the same for both magazines, making the weapon feel more consistent to aim
Decreased the amount of visual recoil when firing the FAMAS, making it slightly less shaky

Increased accuracy by decreasing bullet dispersion when firing from the hip while crouch moving; Increased accuracy by decreasing bullet dispersion when aiming down sights while crouch moving; Increased accuracy by decreasing bullet dispersion when firing from the hip while standing still; Increased accuracy by decreasing bullet dispersion when aiming down sights while standing still; Increased accuracy by decreasing bullet dispersion when firing from the hip while running; Increased accuracy by decreasing bullet dispersion when aiming down sights while running

Decreased the jitter at the end of the weapon’s recoil pattern, making it smoother and easier to use at the end of long bursts of firing; Decreased the amount of visual recoil when firing the M11, making it slightly less shaky
Improved hit sweeps across all melee weapons, to make them more reliable. As a result, it should feel like fewer sweeps get lost to collision with world objects or geometry
Decreased damage from 17 to 16; Increased rate of fire from 850RPM to 860RPM
Prevented invisibility from being canceled by emotes, and ensured Cloaking Device activation is not interrupted when holding an environmental prop
Removed the required instant damage to trigger, making them easier to active
Decreased health from 75 to 50
Decreased health from 75 to 50; Decreased Goo blob health from 300 to 240
Decreased health from 50 to 15; Removed the required instant damage to trigger, making them easier to active
Decreased health from 50 to 15; Removed the required instant damage to trigger, making them easier to active
Decreased cooldown from 35s to 28s
Decreased the health consumed per projectile to 20%, meaning a full health APS can now block 5 projectiles instead of 4
Increased view angle falloff, reducing effects when looking away; Decreased the radial check from 3m to 1m, meaning players will be much less likely to be flashed when looking away from a Flashbang
Decreased the size of the goo wall from 2x6 to 2x5; Decreased goo blob health from 300 to 240
Decreased cooldown from 24s to 20s
Decreased goo blob health from 300 to 240
Increased magazine size from 21 to 24
Decreased damage per pellet from 10 to 9, reducing a full shot’s damage from 110 to 99
Increased environmental damage from 700 to 1000, meaning it takes one less shot to fracture wall segments
Increased damage from 40 to 42
Increased environmental damage from 25 to 30, meaning the Minigun can now more reliably remove three wall segments per full magazine
Decreased the damage of primary attacks from 115 to 100; Decreased the damage of secondary attacks from 200 to 154
Can now equip the Reflector Sight
Rebalance to ensure this sight has the same magnification on all guns, Low (1X). This change affects the XP-54, CB-01 Repeater and R .357 which had higher zoom values
Decreased magnification from High to Medium (1.5X -> 1.25X)
Rebalance to ensure this sight has the same magnification on all guns, Low (1X).
Rebalance to ensure this sight has the same magnification on all guns, Low (1X). This change affects the XP-54 and CB-01 Repeater who had higher zoom values

Burrows through surfaces, blinds enemies, then detonates

Veteran players invite newcomers for shared rewards

bug_fixes: Improved sound prioritization to prevent audio culling

Extended reconnect windows for parties

Private lobby admin promotion added
Spectator HUD improvements with customizable team overview
Controller aim assistance added for deployables

balance_changes.details: Health given per shot decreased from 20 to 15

Cooldown now begins when the Emitter is destroyed, not on deployment; Cooldown reduced from 35 seconds to 30 seconds; Emitter can now be retrieved via the control tablet, setting its remaining cooldown to 15s; Emitter can now be retrieved via a manual interaction, setting its remaining cooldown to 3s

Now detects enemies through Smoke
Now detects enemies through Smoke
Now detects enemies through Smoke
Increased charge time from 0.8s to 1s
Bullets will now pass through Nullified players
Increased the outer width of the hit sweeps by ~40%; Decreased the inner width of the hit sweep nearest to the camera; Increased the duration of the hit sweep from 0.07s to 0.1s
Increased the hit sweep range by ~40cm; Increased the hit sweep height by ~5cm; Decreased the inner width of the hit sweep nearest to the camera
Converted from projectile to hybrid hitscan-projectile; Shots are hitscan up to 25m; Shots are projectiles after 25m; Projectile velocity reduced from 300m/s to 280m/s

Increased the hit sweep range by ~50cm; Increased the lifetime of the hit sweep from 0.04s to 0.12s; Increased the outer width of the hit sweeps by ~70%; Decreased the inner width of the hit sweep nearest to the camera; Decreased the attack duration from 0.9s to 0.81s (effectively increasing attack speed by 10%)
Increased the outer width of the primary attack’s hit sweeps by ~80%; Decreased the inner width of the hit sweep nearest to the camera
Decreased the inner width of the hit sweep nearest to the camera

Primary Attack: Increased damage from 74 to 88; Increased the attack duration from 0.55s to 0.6s; Increased the hit sweep height by ~5cm; Decreased the inner width of the hit sweep nearest to the camera; Secondary Attack: Increased damage from 105 to 120; Decreased the attack duration from 1s to 0.75s; Increased the speed of the lunge from 1500 to 1750; Increased the range of the lunge from 5.5m to 7m; Introduced rotation clamping to the secondary lunge attack (clamped to 40 degree forward angle); Reduced stacking of Evasive Dash momentum with Lunge (average "Super Dash" distance now 17-20m, up from 16-19m)
Cooldown increased from 20s to 30s
Rate of fire decreased from 220 to 210 RPM
Pellet distribution radius decreased by approximately 10%; Heat applied to world objects increased from 2.5 to 7.5
Maximum ammo capacity increased from 6 to 7
Secondary attack damage increased from 154 to 175
Vertical component of secondary attack's rotation clamping increased from 40 degrees to 90 degrees
Decreased healing per shot from 15 to 14
Temporarily disabled Thermal Vision

Decreased the number of charges from 3 to 2; Added new functionality which now remembers exactly which wall segments were dematerialized when a charge was used. These segments are now grouped together and if any of them is rematerialized, all of those in the group will also always be rematerialized; Added a vignette to the screen that will be displayed when a wall segment is dematerialized near the player, just outside of their field of view, so that players are better aware of what is happening around them; Updated the dematerialize effect on walls when activated, adding a slight delay before the wall segment becomes fully transparent; Added a new ‘vibration’ effect to dematerialized wall segments, which will start to play just before the wall segments would automatically rematerialize
Decreased the cooldown from 40s to 35s; Decreased the cooldown when retrieving the turret from 20s to 17.5s
Increased healing rate from 40 per second to 46 per second

Increased cooldown when missing a target from 7s to 10s; Increased cooldown when successfully hitting a Cashout Station or Contestant from 14s to 18s; Increased the cooldown when hitting all other object types from 7s to 14s
Decreased damage falloff minimum range from 35m to 32m; Decreased damage falloff max range from 42.5m to 39m
Increased damage from 84 to 88
Increased how quickly sprinting is re-enabled after the second attack animation begins by 25%; Increased how quickly sprinting is re-enabled after the third attack animation begins by 15%
Increased damage from 42 to 44

Decreased damage from 50 to 48; Decreased damage falloff minimum range from 45m to 40m; Increased damage falloff multiplier from 0.75 to 0.8; Increased the size of bullet dispersion when firing from the hip, especially while crouching, making the weapon less accurate when not aiming down sights

Decreased maximum speed of an attack’s lunge to the target from 10m/s to 7m/s; Decreased minimum speed of an attack’s lunge to the target from 7m/s to 5.5m/s; Decreased the trigger range of the attack’s lunge from 4m to 2.5m
Updated the placement and duration of the smoke’s blocking volume, which hides enemy players. This should now better match the visual effects of the smoke
Increased hitbox size to make it easier to destroy by shooting
Increased hitbox size to make it easier to destroy by shooting

balance_changes.details: Headshot bonus corrected to x1.5 damage
Activation sequence duration decreased from 3s to 2.5s; Cooldown decreased from 25s to 20s
Duration decreased from 15s to 9s; Ammo decreased from 3 to 2

Increased visibility needed to successfully hook an enemy player
Bullet dispersion grew slightly faster than intended
Disabled in TDM game mode.

Tracking effects now reveal players through smoke and reveal Cloaked players who are standing still.
Tracking effects now reveal players through smoke and reveal Cloaked players who are standing still.
Activating the Grapple Hook will now cancel any ongoing interactions.
Reworked the base model for a much needed facelift.

Updated walk animations when the shield is up to align better with the shield’s collision. Removed hit reaction animations in 3rd person if a Contestant is hit while shielded to minimize collision mismatches.

Added the ability for Dome Shields to block the Winch Claw

Damage 26 -> 24; Damage fall-off start range 32m -> 30m; Damage fall-off end range 40m -> 37.5m; Increased the damage fall-off multiplier at max range from 40% to 50%

Damage fall-off start range 10m -> 15m; Damage fall-off end range 15m -> 25m; Increased the damage fall-off multiplier at max range from 62% to 65%

new_content.details: Distinct zones drawing from multiple real-world locations in China
Eight-player format (Attackers vs Defenders) where attackers destroy nine Grand Vaults
Unified progression tracking across all modes with Reward Coins (Gold, Platinum, Diamond, Ruby, Emerald)
Free swapping between sponsors; new sponsors VOLPE and OSPUZE added

bug_fixes: Fixed Thermal Bore passing through surfaces without activating
Resolved aim assist targeting eliminated players
Fixed early reload initiation after firing last bullet
Fixed multiple map collision/clipping exploits across Monaco, Seoul, Bernal, Kyoto

Controller aim snapping added to 10 weapons (.50 Akimbos, BFR Titan, CB-01 Repeater, Cerberus 12GA, M26 Matter, Model 1887, R .357, Recurve Bow, SA1216, SR-84)
Controller aim snap cooldown increased 0.5s -> 0.7s; distance-based scaling implemented
Instant Replay download system optimized
Kyoto vegetation reworked for improved performance
Reduced shader redundancy during matches
Xbox Series S texture streaming improved

Aim down sights zoom time increased from 0.2s to 0.24s; bullet dispersion increased when crouched, moving while crouched, and when standing still.
